ALCHEMIST-ACCESSIBILITY.title: Accessibility
ALCHEMIST-BREW_POTION_CHANCE.hover.desc: The chance that Brewing at a Rest Site offers one of the Alchemist's three Brew-only potions instead of a normal potion. Default: 30%
ALCHEMIST-BREW_POTION_CHANCE.title: Brew potion chance
ALCHEMIST-COMPATIBILITY.title: Compatibility
ALCHEMIST-ECONOMY.title: Economy
ALCHEMIST-ENABLE_EPOCHS.hover.desc: Adds the Alchemist's 7-chapter story to the Timeline, unlocking cards, relics, and potions as you progress. Disable to hide it from the Timeline and make all Alchemist content available immediately; re-enabling restores progress.
ALCHEMIST-ENABLE_EPOCHS.title: Enable Timeline Epochs
ALCHEMIST-FORECAST_COLOR.hover.desc: The color of the delayed-damage preview segment on enemy health bars.
ALCHEMIST-FORECAST_COLOR.title: Damage forecast color
ALCHEMIST-KEEP_POOLS_SEPARATE.hover.desc: Keeps Alchemist cards out of runs that don't include an Alchemist player, so they can't appear in other characters' cross-class rewards (e.g. Kaleidoscope). Disable to let Alchemist cards mix into any run.
ALCHEMIST-KEEP_POOLS_SEPARATE.title: Keep card pools separate
ALCHEMIST-POTION_SELL_PERCENT.hover.desc: The percent value of Gold you will receive when selling to the Merchant. Default: 100%
ALCHEMIST-POTION_SELL_PERCENT.title: Potion sell price
ALCHEMIST-RESET_UNLOCKS.title: Reset all Alchemist cards, relics, potions, and Epochs
ALCHEMIST-REVEAL_TIMELINE.title: Unlock all Alchemist Epochs in the Timeline
ALCHEMIST-SHOW_DAMAGE_FORECASTS.hover.de: Shows a preview segment on an enemy's health bar for the Alchemist's delayed damage, so you can see the pending hit before it lands. Turn off for a cleaner bar.
ALCHEMIST-SHOW_DAMAGE_FORECASTS.title: Show damage forecasts
ALCHEMIST-SHOW_HAND_GLOWS.hover.desc: Highlights cards in your Hand that have a live bonus: green for a Seep card worth keeping, gold for a Gambit or Enchanted payoff. Turn off to hide these highlights.
ALCHEMIST-SHOW_HAND_GLOWS.title: Show card hand glows
ALCHEMIST-TIMELINE.title: Timeline
ALCHEMIST-UNIVERSAL_POTION_SELLING.hover:
[sine]Every[/sine] character sell potions to the [blue]Merchant[/blue]! For [gold]Gold[/gold]!

(Disclaimer: This description was paid for by the Merchant.)
ALCHEMIST-UNIVERSAL_POTION_SELLING.title: Any character can sell potions!
ALCHEMIST-UNLOCK_ALL_BUTTON_LABEL.title: Unlock All
ALCHEMIST-UNLOCK_ALL.title: Unlock all Alchemist cards, relics, potions, and Epochs
ALCHEMIST-UNLOCKS.title: Unlocks
